title: Gui's HUD & UI Edition
description: A better view to the GUI inspired on the Vanilla Minecraft!
body:
---

**Gui's HUD & UI Edition** is a simple sub-pack of **Gui's Better Vanilla**, designed for players who want to refresh their Minecraft HUD and UI while keeping the authentic vanilla vibe and doesn't like other changes of the **Main Resource Pack**. It tweaks menus, buttons, and the in-game interface to feel cleaner and more polished, without changing any textures outside the GUI.

You can find the Main Resource Pack here:

---

AppleSkin mod

Overflowingbars mod

Axiom mod

If you'd like to support me, you can donate to my Paypal!

Any amount helps me out a ton to continue updating and working on this resource pack!

---

- A new view for heart, armor, food containers and xp bar. - Some changes in the slots of armor, shields, and more. - Improved recipe visibility. - Simpler buttons in the menu. - (JUST IN: ENGLISH/PORTUGUESE/ESPAÑOL) Enchanted items now have the enchantment name in yellow and the level in green. ---

Created by GuiiVicent.

Some textures were taken from the Minecraft Movie Event in Minecraft: Bedrock Edition. All rights to the original textures are owned by Mojang Studios.
